view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding fair rotation of inconvenient times.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding fair rotation of inconvenient times.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding fair rotation of inconvenient times.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of rotating inconvenient times fairly, but the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate how the system implements this rotation. While the linked use case mentions the need to rotate inconvenient times fairly, there is no direct evidence or specific examples showing how this is achieved in practice. This indicates a gap in the validation of the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
